channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Avex Music Group Launches $100 Million Publishing Catalog Fund
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to the latest music industry update. Avex Music Group is making big moves, announcing plans to spend $100 million on acquiring music copyrights, companies, and publishing catalogs over the next 12 months.
[Short music transition]
Host: This ambitious project is financed by City National Bank and has already seen its first acquisition: the publishing catalog of songwriter Infamous, also known as Marco Rodriguez. Infamous has worked with artists like Teddy Swims, Lil Wayne, and Charlie Puth.
[Short music transition]
Host: Avex Music Group's goal is to build a portfolio of music IP to complement its existing business. The company has recently partnered with big names like Bruno Mars and has worked with songwriters behind hits for Kehlani, Drake, and Tate McRae.
[Quote sound effect]
Host: As Brandon Silverstein, CEO of Avex Music Group, puts it: "We're focused on investing in culturally defining music at every stage, from creation through long-term ownership." Silverstein will lead the acquisition efforts alongside Avex's CFO Ryusuke Kamada and head of publishing Spencer LeBoff.
[Outro music plays]
Host: Avex Music Group is the music-focused subsidiary of Tokyo-based Avex Inc, a global entertainment company generating around $1 billion annually. We'll be keeping an eye on their progress. Thanks for tuning in to this music industry update.
[Outro music continues to play until the end]
